title: The Lantern Season - A Novel in Progress
content: Emi is an aspiring writer who left her city editing job to write a novel in Springtown. Her working title is 'The Lantern Season.' The novel follows a woman who inherits a mysterious lantern from a grandmother she never knew, containing a letter that leads her to Springtown. Through researching her grandmother's disappearance, she discovers a town built on stories, secrets, and the annual Starlight Festival. Emi has spent three months interviewing residents - Mio about the festival's history, Nori about his undelivered letters, Sakura about her art, and Hana about the tea shop's legacy. She has been invited to read a chapter at Mio's festival. Nori has become her unofficial writing mentor, sharing decades of undelivered letters as inspiration. Emi's novel is structured as a mystery wrapped in a love letter to Springtown itself.
